mapper.sql: alevel_question_answer_id, alevel_question_id, answer_raw, answer_json, mark_scheme_json, mark_scheme_excerpt_text, grading_mode, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_question_answer WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_question_answer answer_row INNER JOIN alevel_question question_row ON question_row.alevel_question_id = answer_row.alevel_question_id SET answer_row.status = 0, answer_row.update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE question_row.alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND question_row.delete_flag = '1' AND answer_row.status = 1 AND answer_row.delete_flag = '1'

UPDATE alevel_question_answer SET answer_raw = #{answerRaw}, answer_json = #{answerJson}, mark_scheme_json = #{markSchemeJson}, mark_scheme_excerpt_text = #{markSchemeExcerptText}, grading_mode = #{gradingMode}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_question_id = #{questionId}
